title: Homemade Mac and Cheese Baked

seo.title: Homemade Baked Mac and Cheese Recipe | Creamy & Easy
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make the best homemade baked mac and cheese from scratch! This creamy, cheesy, and easy recipe is perfect for any meal. Get the full step-by-step guide now!
longTailKeywords: how to make homemade baked mac and cheese
easy homemade baked mac and cheese recipe
best homemade baked mac and cheese recipe
creamy homemade baked mac and cheese
homemade baked mac and cheese from scratch
lowCompetitionKeywords: homemade baked mac and cheese casserole
classic homemade baked mac and cheese
American homemade baked mac and cheese
seo.h1: Homemade Baked Mac and Cheese: The Ultimate Comfort Food Recipe
h2Headings: What is Homemade Baked Mac and Cheese?
Ingredients for Homemade Baked Mac and Cheese
Step-by-Step Instructions for Homemade Baked Mac and Cheese
Tips for the Best Homemade Baked Mac and Cheese
seo.imageAlt: A golden-brown dish of homemade baked mac and cheese, fresh from the oven, with a creamy, cheesy interior.
seo.imageCaption: Indulge in the ultimate comfort food with our easy homemade baked mac and cheese recipe, featuring a perfectly golden crust and gooey cheese.

description: This classic American comfort food features tender pasta enveloped in a rich, creamy cheese sauce, then baked to golden perfection. A crispy breadcrumb topping adds delightful texture to every gooey bite. Its the ultimate dish for family dinners or a cozy night in.

instructions.title: Prepare the Pasta
instructions.text: Preheat your oven to 375F (190C). Cook the elbow macaroni according to package directions until al dente. Drain well and set aside. Do not rinse the pasta.

instructions.title: Make the Roux
instructions.text: In a large saucepan or Dutch oven, melt the butter over medium heat. Whisk in the flour and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly, until a smooth paste forms. This is your roux.

instructions.title: Whisk in Milk and Seasonings
instructions.text: Gradually whisk the warmed milk into the roux, a little at a time, to avoid lumps. Continue whisking until the sauce is smooth and begins to thicken, about 5-7 minutes. Stir in the Dijon mustard, nutmeg, salt, and black pepper.

instructions.title: Add the Cheese
instructions.text: Remove the saucepan from the heat. Add 3 cups of the shredded sharp cheddar cheese and all of the Gruyere cheese, if using, to the sauce. Stir until the cheese is completely melted and the sauce is smooth and creamy. Taste and adjust seasonings as needed.

instructions.title: Combine and Assemble
instructions.text: Add the cooked and drained macaroni to the cheese sauce, stirring gently until all the pasta is evenly coated. Pour the macaroni and cheese mixture into a 9x13 inch baking dish.

instructions.title: Prepare and Add Topping
instructions.text: In a small bowl, combine the Panko breadcrumbs, the remaining 1 cup of sharp cheddar cheese, and the grated Parmesan cheese. Sprinkle this mixture evenly over the top of the macaroni and cheese in the baking dish.

instructions.title: Bake to Golden Perfection
instructions.text: Bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until the mac and cheese is bubbly around the edges and the topping is golden brown and crispy. Let it rest for 5-10 minutes before serving.

tips: For an extra rich, authentic American taste, use a combination of sharp cheddar and a melting cheese like Gruyere or Fontina.
Ensure your milk is warm when adding it to the roux to prevent the sauce from becoming lumpy and to help it thicken smoothly.
Let the mac and cheese rest for 5-10 minutes after baking; this allows the sauce to set slightly, making it creamier and easier to serve.
article: Homemade Mac and Cheese Baked is a beloved American Pasta and Noodles dish enjoyed across American. This authentic recipe brings traditional flavors to your kitchen.
